title: IssueTypeIssueCreateMetadata
description: Details of the issue creation metadata for an issue type.

avatarId.description: The ID of the issue type's avatar.

description.description: The description of the issue type.

expand.description: Expand options that include additional issue type metadata details in the response.

fields.description: List of the fields available when creating an issue for the issue type.

hierarchyLevel.description: Hierarchy level of the issue type.

iconUrl.description: The URL of the issue type's avatar.

id.description: The ID of the issue type.

name.description: The name of the issue type.

scope.description: Details of the next-gen projects the issue type is available in.

self.description: The URL of these issue type details.

subtask.description: Whether this issue type is used to create subtasks.
